title: iFealClear Bathroom Basin Waste with Pull Rod, Pop Up Sink Waste with Lever, Pop Up Plug with Push Pull Rod Lever, G 1 1/4 inch, Chrome
features: 1.Hygienic & Hands-Free Operation: Enjoy touch-free convenience and superior cleanliness. Simply lift the lever to operate the lift up sink waste without touching stagnant water, reducing germs for a healthier bathroom.

2.Long-lasting, Rust-Proof Chrome Finish: Crafted from high-quality brass with a premium scratch-resistant chrome coating. This pop up plug withstands daily use and resists corrosion from cleaners, ensuring your basin stays pristine for years.

3.Easy 5-Minute Installation & Universal Fit: This basin waste with pull rod fits standard 11/4 inch holes and includes an integrated overflow. Installation is a simple DIY task—everything included, just a screwdriver needed!

4.Smooth Water Flow & Secure Seal: The push pull rod lever mechanism ensures efficient drainage to prevent pooling. A high-quality rubber seal provides a watertight lock, while the four side wings efficiently trap debris.

5.Compatible with Lever-Hole Basin Taps (Check Before Purchase): This pop up sink waste with lever is operated by a rod lever. It is designed to work with basin mixer taps that have a dedicated hole on the back or side for the actuating rod. Please ensure your existing tap has this hole before purchase.
